title: CDAC is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: CDAC is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!
